highlights.title: All 20 Rewayat
highlights.description: Browse every qira'at narration in one place. Eight come with full mushaf text and diff highlighting; the rest are previewed for audio

highlights.title: Consistent Highlighting
highlights.description: Rewayah differences now show the same foreground and background colors whether you're in page mode, vertical mushaf, or list view

highlights.title: Liquid Glass Explore
highlights.description: The search tab's browse tiles adopt iOS 26's Liquid Glass material, with a refined bordered look on other devices

highlights.title: Quieter Chrome
highlights.description: The persistent offline banner is gone — network changes now surface as brief native toasts, only when something actually changes

features: Full 20-rewayat picker in mushaf settings with a collapsible accordion showing your current selection
Share any recent-played recitation from the reciter long-press sheet
iOS 26 Liquid Glass treatment for the search-tab browse tiles
Cross-platform network-status toasts on connection loss, recovery, and backend fallback
Consistent foreground rewayah diff highlighting across paginated mushaf, vertical mushaf, and list modes
improvements: Adhkar cards now show titles below the artwork with sharper corners
Review and Learn About icons render at full text color
Clearer 'Add reciter to favorites' vs 'Add to loved' labels in the recent-reciter sheet
Mushaf settings rewayat list collapses by default; diff toggle promoted above the list
Mini player auto-collapses on scroll in mushaf settings and the search tab on iOS 26
fixes: Recovered users stuck on a stale pre-canonical rewayah slug (mushaf would fail to load)
Android toasts now show the full text (previously the subtitle was dropped)
Explore-tab bento tiles no longer double-pad under the search bar on iOS 26
Share sheet from the recent-reciter options no longer conflicts with the dismissing action sheet
technical: Shared RewayahDiffService.getRewayahRuleMapFor* helper consumed by all three mushaf renderers
Defensive migratePersistedId guards in DigitalKhattDataService and MushafPreloadService init paths
ApiDisruptionBanner replaced by NetworkStatusMonitor — headless, transition-only toast emitter
burnt toast wrapper accepts a preset argument; Android merges title+message into a single line

highlights.title: Word by Word
highlights.description: Tap any word to see its meaning, transliteration, and grammar — right in the mushaf or player

highlights.title: Translations & Tafseer
highlights.description: Browse dozens of translations and scholarly commentaries in multiple languages, all downloadable for offline use

highlights.title: Thematic Highlighting
highlights.description: Verses are color-coded by theme so you can see the structure and topics of each surah at a glance

highlights.title: IndoPak Script
highlights.description: Switch to the IndoPak Nastaliq script in the mushaf for the style used across South Asia

highlights.title: The Mushaf
highlights.description: A dedicated reading screen with full Uthmani script, tajweed coloring, and immersive mode

highlights.title: Follow Along
highlights.description: Each ayah highlights in sync with the recitation, available for most reciters

highlights.title: Ambient Sounds
highlights.description: Layer nature soundscapes over your recitation for a focused experience

highlights.title: Verse Interactions
highlights.description: Bookmark, highlight, take notes, copy, and share any verse

highlights.title: Personal Recitations
highlights.description: Import, tag, and organize your own audio recordings

highlights.title: Adhkar (Remembrance)
highlights.description: Complete Hisnul Muslim collection with audio playback and saved favorites

features: Digital Uthmani Mushaf with Skia rendering and tajweed coloring
Ayah-by-ayah timestamp tracking and auto-scroll for 43 reciters
Complete Hisnul Muslim adhkar collection with audio and Play All
8 ambient nature soundscapes with gapless dual-player crossfade
Verse annotations: bookmark, highlight, notes, copy, share
Personal recitations upload with metadata tagging
Immersive reading mode with tap-to-hide chrome
Mushaf audio player with ayah-by-ayah playback
Verse share cards with Skia rendering
Similar verses and shared phrases discovery
Mushaf session restore on app relaunch
Skia surah headers and mushaf-style basmala in player
improvements: New expo-audio engine replacing react-native-track-player
Redesigned search with dual-mode browse/search crossfade
Redesigned reciter profiles with centered layout
Adhkar category card illustrations (dark/light variants)
Mushaf deep-linking by surah, page, or ayah
Lock screen controls with reliable metadata and artwork
fixes: Queue auto-advance and previous button reliability
Lock screen controls showing empty metadata
Player sheet panning and gesture coordination
technical: Expo SDK 54 upgrade with full dependency migration
Replaced RNEUI Icon with @expo/vector-icons across 70 files
Migrated TouchableOpacity to Pressable throughout player
Android performance: largeHeap, inline requires, lazy-loading
QuranView scroll optimization with FlashList and memoization

highlights.title: Custom Playlists
highlights.description: Create and manage your own playlists

highlights.title: Redesigned Search
highlights.description: Beautiful bento layout with curated system playlists

features: Complete offline download system with progress tracking
Bulk download for playlists and collections
Create, edit, and manage custom playlists
Reorder and delete playlist items
Juz-based surah grouping in browse and reciter screens
Enhanced collection screen with rewayat-aware downloads
Download state indicators throughout the app
Storage management with usage breakdown
Gradient text highlighting for currently playing track
Juz section separators in browse all surahs screen
improvements: Eliminated navigation lag in explore view
Fixed play icon flickering
Optimized button interactions across the app
Significant performance boost for main UI
Improved FloatingPlayer visibility logic
Better audio player state management
Enhanced download performance to prevent freezing
Improved collection and playlist organization
Better touch zones for surah list items
fixes: Fixed download UI freezing during operations
